name: C-19 --paywalled flag is accepted and the refresh sweep completes per the paywalled HEAD-only contract
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/paywall-src.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --upstream-stub ./up.sh --paywalled 2>err.txt && echo paywall 1>&2
